About ABN AMRO Bank N.V.

https://www.abnamro.nl/

ABN AMRO Bank N.V. is a financial institution that serves retail, private, and commercial banking clients. The bank offers a comprehensive range of financial products and services, including daily banking, payments, insurance, and investment solutions. ABN AMRO pursues a strategy as a 'personal bank in the digital age,' combining fully digital services for everyday transactions with personalized advice and support for significant financial moments. The institution also places a strategic focus on areas such as sustainability, innovation, and social entrepreneurship.

Progress on ABN AMRO share buyback programme 1 May – 7 May 2026
Transaction in Own Shares Classification · 100% confidence The document is a press release detailing the progress of a share buyback program by ABN AMRO, including specific transaction details such as number of shares repurchased, average price, and total amount spent. It references the start of a €250 million share buyback program and provides a link for more detailed information. This fits the definition of a Transaction in Own Shares (POS) filing, which covers company announcements about buying back its own shares.
2026-05-08 English
Progress on ABN AMRO share buyback programme 1 May – 7 May 2026
Transaction in Own Shares Classification · 100% confidence The document is a short announcement detailing the progress of ABN AMRO's share buyback programme for a specific week in May 2026. It provides transaction details such as the number of shares repurchased, average price, and total amount spent. The document does not contain comprehensive financial statements or analysis but focuses solely on the share repurchase activity. According to the classification rules, announcements about share repurchases or sales by the company itself fall under the category 'Transaction in Own Shares' (POS). The document length is short and it is clearly an update on the buyback programme, not a full financial report or other type of filing.

Endpoints

most-used routes for this company
GET /api/companies/3800/ Company identity, sector, listing, identifiers
GET /api/filings/?company=3800 Paginated list of all filings (filterable by type, date, language)
GET /api/filings/{id}/ Single filing — metadata, document URL, processing status
GET /api/filings/{id}/markdown/ Filing content as Markdown (PDF → text/tables/figures)
GET /api/isins/?company=3800 All ISINs registered to this company
GET /api/filing-types/ Reference: every filing-type code + category
Full reference: API reference · OpenAPI schema

cURL

latest filings for ABN AMRO Bank N.V. 
$ curl https://api.financialreports.eu/api/filings/?company=3800 \
    -H "x-api-key: $FR_API_KEY" \
    -H "Accept: application/json"

Python

requests 
import requests

r = requests.get(
    "https://api.financialreports.eu/api/filings/",
    params={"company": 3800},
    headers={"x-api-key": API_KEY},
)
filings = r.json()["results"]
